invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.description: Send an invitation email. They'll create an account when they accept.
invite.name: Name (optional)
invite.nameHint: Used to personalize the invitation email
invite.scannerDescription: Can scan customer passes and add stamps via mobile app
invite.adminDescription: Can manage team members and access all business features
invite.adminOnlyScanner: As an admin, you can only invite scanners

removeDialog.title: Remove team member?
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the team? They will lose access to this business.

cancelInviteDialog.title: Cancel invitation?
cancelInviteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation to {email}? They will no longer be able to join your team with this invite.

emptyState.title: Build your team
emptyState.description: Add team members so your employees can scan loyalty cards and help manage your business.
emptyState.adminDescription: Manage team members, view analytics, and configure settings
emptyState.scannerDescription: Scan customer passes and add stamps via the mobile app
